summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Castrez Autrans workshop management system. Backend APIs working well (96.3% success rate), admin login functional, but frontend has JavaScript errors affecting Select components in admin panel.

minor_bugs.issue: Update endpoint requires all fields instead of allowing partial updates
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot update workplace with only name field - requires address field

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript runtime errors: Select.Item components missing value prop
ui_bugs.error_details: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

integration_issues.issue: Reports section not found in navigation menu
Geolocation permission not granted - shows 'No se pudo obtener la ubicación'

passed_tests: Backend health check and API connectivity
All CRUD operations for employees, workplaces, attendance
Homepage loading with video hero section
Admin dashboard navigation (Productos, Citas, Promociones, Empleados, Lugares, Asistencia)
Attendance page loading and employee search functionality
Public API endpoints for products and appointments

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (core functionality works but has JavaScript errors)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript Select component errors in admin panel by ensuring all Select.Item components have proper value props. Add Reports section to admin navigation. Consider implementing geolocation permission request for attendance tracking.
